top3.sql:
SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN (
    SELECT bowler, 
           COUNT(*) AS wickets,
           SUM(COALESCE(bs.runs_scored, 0)) + COALESCE(er.extra_runs_total, 0) AS runs_conceded
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    LEFT JOIN wicket_taken wt ON bb.match_id = wt.match_id 
                               AND bb.over_id = wt.over_id 
                               AND bb.ball_id = wt.ball_id 
                               AND bb.innings_no = wt.innings_no
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT match_id,...

SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN (
    SELECT bowler, 
           COUNT(*) AS total_balls,
           SUM(CASE WHEN w.player_out IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wickets
    FROM ball_by_ball b
    LEFT JOIN wicket_taken w 
        ON b.match_id = w.match_id 
        AND b.over_id = w.over_id 
        AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id 
        AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
    GROUP BY bowler
) bw ON p.player_id = bw.bowler
WHERE bw.wickets > 0
ORDER BY (bw.total_balls / bw.wickets) ASC
LIMIT ...

SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN (
    SELECT bowler, 
           COUNT(*) AS total_balls,
           SUM(CASE WHEN w.player_out IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wickets
    FROM ball_by_ball b
    LEFT JOIN wicket_taken w 
        ON b.match_id = w.match_id 
        AND b.over_id = w.over_id 
        AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id 
        AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
    GROUP BY bowler
) bw ON p.player_id = bw.bowler
WHERE bw.wickets > 0
ORDER BY (bw.total_balls / bw.wickets) ASC
LIMIT ...

SELECT p.player_name
FROM player p
JOIN (
    SELECT bowler,
           COUNT(*) AS total_balls,
           COUNT(w.player_out) AS wickets
    FROM ball_by_ball b
    LEFT JOIN wicket_taken w 
        ON b.match_id = w.match_id 
        AND b.over_id = w.over_id 
        AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id 
        AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
    GROUP BY bowler
) bw ON p.player_id = bw.bowler
WHERE bw.wickets > 0
ORDER BY CAST(bw.total_balls AS REAL) / bw.wickets ASC
LIMIT 1;
